arguments.summary: Implemented circular buffer Ring in internal/buffer/buffer.go. Uses fixed array with head/tail pointers and count. Write overwrites oldest when full (advances head). Read returns oldest (FIFO). All 3 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Implemented ring buffer in internal/buffer/buffer.go. Fixed-size circular buffer with Write (overwrites on full) and Read (FIFO). All 3 tests pass.
